allowed_tools.description: Optional list of tool ids the skill expects to reach for. Emitted as the spec's space-separated `allowed-tools` frontmatter at freeze.

body.description: Initial SKILL.md markdown body. Any leading YAML frontmatter is stripped at freeze — frontmatter is assembled from the structured fields.

compatibility.description: Agent Skills `compatibility` frontmatter — environment requirements (intended product, packages, network access). Max 500 chars.

description.description: Required description (1–1024 chars, per the Agent Skills spec) — what the skill does and when to use it. Shown in the list view + system-prompt skill index.

files.description: Optional companion files (scripts/, references/, assets/ — arbitrarily nested) at creation time.

content.description: File body. Plain text or markdown — companion files are not interpreted by the runner.

content_type.description: MIME type hint. Read-only at runtime; aids the registry UI's file viewer.

path.description: Relative path inside the skill folder; may include subfolders (e.g. `references/api.md`, `scripts/run.py`, `assets/x/y.json`). Becomes `bundle/skills/<alias>/<path>` at freeze. No `..` traversal or absolute paths.

license.description: Agent Skills `license` frontmatter — license name or a reference to a bundled license file.

metadata.description: Agent Skills `metadata` map (string → string) for non-promoted keys like author or version.

name.description: Slug-shaped name unique per team (max 64 chars, per the Agent Skills spec). `@posthog/<slug>` is reserved for canonical templates.
